prompt: Visual novel background art, 16:9 full-screen, NO people, no characters, no watermark. Clean anime-style painted background, crisp lineart edges, muted earthy palette. The INTERIOR of an Adventurer's Guild hall in a faux-medieval fantasy town: a long wooden service counter with a clerk's station (ledgers, inkwell, small scale for coin), behind it pigeonhole shelves of documents; on one wall a large notice board crowded with pinned papers and bounty notices (all paper text greeked/unreadable); wood-and-stone hall with ceiling beams, daylight through tall windows, a few benches. Practical, busy, well-worn.

Event CG illustration for a kinetic novel, full-scene composition, 16:9. Clean anime lineart, muted earthy palette, soft cel shading, painterly detailed background. No text, no watermark. Use the character from the reference image; IGNORE the flat magenta reference background. In the crowd at a slave auction, harsh midday light, other bidders around him rendered as dark anonymous silhouettes: the rich nobleman from the reference — soft doughy pampered face, silk-and-fur-trimmed robes in deep blue and gold, jeweled rings — with one hand RAISED HIGH mid-bid, mouth open shouting a price, imperious. Behind him stand two heavyset scarred bodyguards with plain dark iron slave collars, faces impassive. At his side KNEELS a skeletally thin young human girl in a threadbare shift, also collared, old scars on her arms, eyes down, motionless — rendered with restraint: no wounds, no gore, just thinness, stillness and downcast eyes. She is small in the composition but clearly visible. The contrast between his opulence and her condition is the entire point of the image.

Night camp, the two seated side by side on a log before a warm campfire, seen from across the fire at a slight angle. The beastfolk woman from the first reference — wolf ears, russet-auburn hair, dark iron slave collar, plain earth-tone camp tunic, russet wolf tail curled beside her — rests her head on the shoulder of the young man from the second reference — dark curly hair, cloak off his shoulders like a blanket, light leather armor removed, simple undershirt, sneakers. Her eyes are closed, utterly content. HIS expression is the key: caught between comfort and guilt — a faint almost-smile that does not reach his troubled eyes, gaze fixed on the fire. Warm firelight against cold blue night, intimate and quietly wrong.
